Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}After returning from Tartarus, {f 0 1 2}the Dark Hour will end{f 0 1 27}. This will start the next day. Use this time wisely to recuperate for your next expedition.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}{f 0 1 2}The structure of Tartarus will have changed{f 0 1 27} by your next expedition. {f 0 1 2}Treasure chests you have already found can be rediscovered{f 0 1 27} as well, so returning could be a good idea if you find yourself stuck.[n]{f 1 1}
